task_completion.description: Agent creates a database dump from the source PostgreSQL 13 container.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a 'pg_dump' command targeting port 5433 or the 'chinook-pg13' container, resulting in a .sql or .dump file.

task_completion.description: Agent verifies or starts the target PostgreSQL 15 container.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a 'docker run' command creating 'chinook-pg15' on port 5434, or 'docker ps' confirming the container is running on port 5434.

task_completion.description: Agent ensures the 'chinook' database exists in the target container.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of 'createdb' targeting port 5434, or a 'CREATE DATABASE chinook;' SQL command executed on the target container.

task_completion.description: Agent imports the database dump into the target PostgreSQL 15 container.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a 'psql' or 'pg_restore' command importing the previously created dump file into port 5434 or the 'chinook-pg15' container.

task_completion.description: Agent verifies the presence of the expected tables in the target database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a psql session connected to port 5434 executing '\dt' or a similar query, displaying the Chinook tables (e.g., Artist, Album, Track).

task_completion.description: Agent verifies row-count fidelity in the target database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'SELECT COUNT(*)' queries or similar validation steps executed on the target database to ensure all rows were migrated.

integrity.description: Agent executed actual commands in a terminal emulator rather than typing mocked outputs in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of standard shell prompts, command execution history, and standard error/output streams in a terminal window.

integrity.description: Docker command outputs show genuine formatting and container IDs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Outputs from 'docker ps' or 'docker run' display authentic Docker formatting, hashes, and port mappings rather than manually typed text.

integrity.description: PostgreSQL interactive terminal (psql) outputs show standard formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: psql query results, table listings (\dt), and connection messages display the standard PostgreSQL ASCII table formatting and headers.
